placeholderImages.longDescription: Tasaheel Finance Showroom: Integration of Identity and Technology Elc Contracting delivered a comprehensive turnkey solution for the Tasaheel showroom, featuring: Facade & Signage: A modern glass facade with Alucobond cladding and a wide-span signboard with internal lighting to highlight the brand. Custom Counters: Design and fabrication of bespoke, streamlined customer service counters in black and white, enhanced with blue LED accents. Decor & Finishing: Premium marble flooring and innovative gypsum ceilings that blend aesthetic appeal with functional design. Mechanical Systems: Advanced electrical networking and a concealed central AC system to ensure visitor comfort and a quiet environment. Furnishing: A modern waiting area equipped with contemporary leather furniture reflecting the showroom’s corporate identity.

ELC Contracting successfully delivered a comprehensive Turnkey Solution for the Tasaheel Trading Company headquarters, managing the project from conceptual design to final handover. Key Deliverables: Full Turnkey Execution: Handled everything from initial structural finishes to final furniture installation. Interior Design: Implementation of modern workstations, glass partitions, and premium marble/wood cladding for the reception area. Technical Fit-out: Complete installation of networking, power systems, and IP telephony, ensuring the office was plug-and-play ready. Site Management: Professional handling of logistics, site protection, and final finishing to ensure immediate operational readiness. Result: A sophisticated, high-performance workspace that perfectly aligns with the client's corporate identity.

placeholderImages.description: Chairman of the Board’s Office at Tasahil Exhibition
placeholderImages.longDescription: Chairman’s Office – Tasahil Showroom | Design & Implementation We designed and executed this executive workspace, blending futuristic innovation with premium luxury. Bespoke Design: Custom-built futuristic desk with integrated LED lighting. Premium Finishes: High-end dark wood paneling, marble flooring, and gold accents. Smart Layout: A perfect balance between a formal workstation and a luxury executive lounge. Signature Lighting: A unique geometric ceiling design for a seamless, professional ambiance. The Result: A workspace crafted to reflect leadership and professional excellence.

ELC Contracting successfully delivered the Raseed Holding headquarters as a Turnkey Project, managing everything from initial design to the final finishing touches: Integrated Solutions: Full design and execution of offices, meeting rooms, and the outdoor lounge. Smart Fit-out: Premium finishes with complete installation of all technical and MEP systems. Outdoor Terrace: Creating a unique breakout space that blends nature with modern architecture. ELC Contracting.. From concept to completion.

Nadira Riyadh Telecommunications Complex | Design & Build Executed by: Elc Contracting At Elc Contracting, we delivered a turnkey solution for the Nadira Riyadh Complex, transforming the space into a modern tech hub that balances high-impact branding with retail functionality. Project Scope & Highlights: Exterior Facade & Signage: We designed and installed a contemporary Cladding facade featuring high-visibility 3D backlit LED signage to ensure a dominant street presence. Custom Retail Counters: Our team manufactured and installed organized, numbered sales booths, each integrated with signature blue LED strip lighting to reinforce the brand identity. Premium Display Units: We equipped the showroom with custom glass showcases designed for maximum product visibility, security, and organized merchandising. Interior Infrastructure: The project included a complete lighting system and high-gloss flooring, creating a bright, professional, and spacious environment for customers.

placeholderImages.description: Al Waleed bin Talal's Private Office
placeholderImages.longDescription: The Luxury of Simplicity: Office Design & Execution for the Private Office Manager of HRH Prince Alwaleed Bin TalalProject Description: Elc Contracting proudly presents this interior masterpiece. We undertook the complete design and execution of the office for the Private Office Manager of HRH Prince Alwaleed Bin Talal. Our vision for this project was to craft a workspace that embodies professional sophistication while ensuring maximum comfort and tranquillity. The project features refined modern touches, including: Flooring: The use of luxurious Grey Marble with natural veins creates a sense of spaciousness and grandeur. Lighting: A thoughtful distribution of ambient lighting and spotlights, complemented by concealed lighting in the ceiling and shelving units to accentuate the design aesthetics. Furniture & Woodwork: We selected a sleek, curved white desk to soften traditional lines, paired with a lounge area that combines modern sofas and comfortable seating for hosting guests. Walls & Decor: A harmonious blend of soft, light paint and dark wood cladding behind the display screen creates an elegant and attractive visual contrast.

placeholderImages.description: Electronic Examination Hall – Al-Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University
placeholderImages.longDescription: Electronic Examination Hall – Al-Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University Design & Build by ELC Contracting (Turnkey Project) ELC Contracting delivered a complete turnkey solution for the Electronic Examination Hall at Al-Imam University, designed specifically to host academic final exams with high efficiency. Project Scope: Main Examination Hall: Comprehensive fit-out of the hall, optimized for electronic final examinations, ensuring a quiet and organized environment for students. Installation of advanced power and data infrastructure to support hundreds of exam stations simultaneously. Entrances & Flow Management: Design and execution of the hall entrances to manage the high traffic of students during exam periods smoothly. Visual Identity (Signage & Branding): Application of university branding through wall graphics and directional signage to guide students to their exam seats. Reception & Support Area: Construction of a fully equipped reception counter to assist students and proctors before and during exams.

The Face Shop Project | Execution by ELC Contracting ELC Contracting is proud to have executed the fit-out for The Face Shop, the leading Korean skincare brand. The project was delivered as a Turnkey Solution, with strict adherence to the brand’s global visual identity that blends nature with modern aesthetics. Execution & Engineering Highlights: Facade & Branding: Installation of a full-span transparent glass facade to provide a panoramic view of the showroom. Execution of the illuminated signage in the brand’s signature green, utilizing high-clarity LED technology. Fixtures & Displays: Fabrication and installation of wall-mounted shelving units, combining black metal frames with light-toned wood for a modern, organized look. Execution of the central "Display Island," featuring integrated storage drawers and smooth wooden surfaces for product testing. Flooring & Lighting: Installation of high-quality wood-finish flooring (Parquet) to add warmth and align with the brand's natural product concept. Strategic layout of ceiling spotlights to ensure even light distribution and highlight product details on the shelves. Technical Infrastructure: Completion of all electrical wiring, safety systems, and fire protection in full compliance with major shopping mall standards. Commitment to Excellence: Through this project, ELC Contracting demonstrated its ability to execute projects according to international franchise standards, ensuring a high-quality finish that enhances the customer’s shopping experience.

Dokhoon Al Emarat Showroom | Fit-out Execution by ELC Contracting ELC Contracting was responsible for the Fit-out and Execution of the Dokhoon Al Emarat showroom. We successfully transformed the client's approved designs into reality with precision and high-quality craftsmanship, delivering a complete Turnkey Project. Execution Highlights: Design Implementation: Strict adherence to Dokhoon’s architectural plans and visual identity, ensuring every detail was executed exactly as designed. Premium Material Installation: Gold Stainless Steel Work: Expert installation of gold metal accents and shelving with a flawless finish. Marble & Surfaces: Precision fitting of high-grade marble for counters and flooring. Woodworks: Fabrication and installation of wall cladding and display units according to the specified technical drawings. Lighting & Electrical Systems: Execution of the lighting layout, including the installation of spotlights and integrated LED strips, to perfectly illuminate the merchandise as per the design intent. Turnkey Handover: Delivery of a fully operational showroom, ready for business immediately upon completion.

Private Villa Project - Al-Sahafa District | Design & Build by ELC Contracting
ELC Contracting is proud to showcase this premium residential project in the heart of the Al-Sahafa district. Our team managed the entire process from Initial Design to the final Turnkey Handover, ensuring a seamless transition from concept to a fully furnished luxury home.

Project Highlights & Premium Materials:
Custom Design: We created the architectural and interior identity from scratch, tailored to meet the client's vision and the prestigious nature of the location.

Superior Material Selection:
  • Italian Marble: Used for flooring and entrance areas to provide a timeless sense of luxury.
  • Spanish Porcelain: Carefully selected for its durability and elegant finish in specific zones.
  • German Wood: High-quality German wood was utilized for wall cladding and bespoke decorative features, ensuring a warm and natural feel.

Full Furnishing: We sourced and installed luxury furniture sets and majlis seating, meticulously coordinated with the marble and wood elements for a harmonious aesthetic.

Turnkey Execution: The project included all technical installations, from smart lighting systems to HVAC, making the villa ready for immediate occupancy.

The ELC Commitment:
At ELC Contracting, we don't just build; we curate every detail. By integrating Italian marble and German wood under the supervision of our expert execution team, we deliver a residential masterpiece that redefines quality and sophistication.
